content:
Disappointed with my experience with DTDC Express Limited Express Limited.

I booked a shipment on an urgent basis and paid an additional charge for expedited delivery because it was time-sensitive. I was assured that the package would be delivered today, but despite the commitment, it has still not been delivered.

To make matters worse, I raised a support ticket this evening, hoping for a quick resolution. Unfortunately, there has been been no update, no delivery, and no meaningful response.

Charging customers extra for urgent delivery creates an expectation that the promised timeline will be met. If delays occur, timely communication and prompt support should be the minimum standard.

I request DTDC Express Limited Express Limited to look into this matter urgently and deliver the shipment without any further delay.

comment: Expedited services need stronger exception management too. When a delay is unavoidable, proactive updates and clear escalation paths often matter as much as the delivery timeline itself.
